name: Shrimp Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Cooked shrimp, shelled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta until al dente, drain well and toss with 2 tablespoons olive oil.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. Cut some of the shrimp into smaller pieces if desired.
4. Thoroughly mix remaining olive oil, lemon juice, herbs, salt, and Tabasco sauce. Taste and adjust seasonings.
5. In a serving bowl, toss the pasta, shrimp, dressing, and parsley.
6. Cover and let flavors blend about 1/2 hour. (Refrigerate if salad won't be served for more than 1/2 hour.)
7. Just before serving, toss again.
